wordplay_note: He feeds the masses thin broth — lies instead of substance
card_description: Stanton Brose (meaning "Brose = broth/pottage") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Penultimate Truth*. Grotesque and ancient leader of the Yance-men who maintain the war hoax. Name note: He feeds the masses thin broth — lies instead of substance. Power sustained through manufactured crisis — the eternal war president. First appears in *The Penultimate Truth*.

reference.brief: Grotesque and ancient leader of the Yance-men who maintain the war hoax
reference.significance: Power sustained through manufactured crisis — the eternal war president
